data.body: AC amendment: Extracted shell utility functions must follow the existing hooks/lib/ flat naming convention (e.g., extract-functions.sh, not lib-extract-functions.sh — the lib-*.sh prefix is NOT used in this project's hooks/lib/). Verify existing convention: ls plugins/dso/hooks/lib/*.sh (shows: config-paths.sh, deps.sh, dispatcher.sh, fuzzy-match.sh, merge-state.sh, etc. — all flat names without lib- prefix).
